statement: Tal Rasha's Wrappings is a 5-piece Sorceress set. Pieces: (1) Tal Rasha's Fine-Spun Cloth (Mesh Belt) — +20 FCR, +30 Life, +30 Mana, +20 Str, 10-15 MF; (2) Tal Rasha's Adjudication (Amulet) — +2 Sorc Skills, +33 Mana, Lightning Res +42, +57 Life, 20 MF; (3) Tal Rasha's Lidless Eye (Swirling Crystal, orb) — +1 to Fire Skills, +1 to Light Skills, +2 Energy, +19 Mana, +10 Mana After Kill, 25 MF; (4) Tal Rasha's Horadric Crest (Death Mask) — +2 to All Skills, 10% Life Leech, 10% Mana Leech, +60 Life, +30 Mana, +15 All Res, 45 MF; (5) Tal Rasha's Guardianship (Lacquered Plate) — Cold/Fire/Lightning Absorb 10%, +400 Defense, +88 Life, 88 MF. Set partial bonuses: 2-piece: +50 Life; 3-piece: +65% Magic Find; 4-piece: +15% All Resistances; Full 5-piece: +2 to Sorceress Skill Levels, +20% FCR (stacks with belt), cold/fire/lightning absorbs, +125 Life, +125 Mana, total ~300% MF at level 99. Standard MF Sorceress endgame setup: usually Tal Mask + Tal Armor + Tal Ammy + Tal Belt for the 4-piece MF bonus (~195 MF from gear alone). Often paired with Insight Mercenary for Meditation aura. Core 4-piece is more accessible than 5-piece due to orb being easily replaced by Heart of the Oak or better. qlvl: mask=66, belt=65, amulet=65, orb=65, armor=71.

Immortal King is a 6-piece Barbarian set. Pieces: IK Stone Crusher (Ogre Maul), IK Will (Avenger Guard), IK Forge (Mirrored Boots), IK Detail (War Belt), IK Soul Cage (Sacred Armor), IK Pillar (War Gauntlets). 6-piece bonus: +2 Warcries, +12 Life per Kill, massive Crushing Blow/Life boost. Popular for Whirlwind Barbarian builds.

Natalya's Odium is a 4-piece Assassin set. Pieces: Natalya's Totem (Grim Helm), Natalya's Mark (Scissors Suwayyah), Natalya's Shadow (Loricated Mail), Natalya's Soul (Mesh Boots). 4-piece bonus: +3 Assassin Skills, +350 Defense, All Resistances +50, Regenerate Mana 20%. The set's Shadow Armor is popular standalone for its high Str reduction.

Griswold's Legacy is a 4-piece Paladin set. Pieces: Griswold's Redemption (Caduceus), Griswold's Honor (Vortex Shield), Griswold's Valor (Corona), Griswold's Heart (Ornate Plate). Full set bonus: +3 Combat Skills (Paladin), +20 FCR, +20 FHR, +2 to Prayer. The Vortex Shield alone is sought for max block + sockets base.

Aldur's Watchtower is a 4-piece Druid set. Pieces: Aldur's Stony Gaze (Hunter's Guise), Aldur's Deception (Shadow Plate), Aldur's Gauntlet (Sharkskin Gloves), Aldur's Advance (Battle Boots). 4-piece bonus: +2 Druid Skills, Fire Resist +50%, +200 Life, 40% FRW. The boots stand out as a best-in-slot option for budget Elemental Druids needing FRW.

M'avina's Battle Hymn is a 5-piece Amazon set. Pieces: M'avina's True Sight (Diamond Bow), M'avina's Caster (Glorious Axe wait - actually Battle Gauntlets), M'avina's Icy Clutch (Battle Gauntlets), M'avina's Tenet (Sharkskin Belt), M'avina's Embrace (Kraken Shell). 5-piece bonus: +2 Amazon Skills, adds 131-252 Cold damage, +25% Magic Find, Freezes Target. Popular for Bowazon MF builds.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

Sigon's Complete Steel is a 6-piece early-game set commonly used for twinking low-level characters. 2-piece bonus (Helm+Shield): 30% MF. Helm+Gloves: +1 All Skills. Various partial bonuses add significant attack rating and life. Popular twink set for new characters due to low level requirements and strong 2-piece bonuses.
